title: Snailclimb/JavaGuide
summary: JavaGuide 是一个涵盖计算机基础、数据库、分布式、高并发及 AI 应用开发的 Java 面试与后端通用面试指南。
translated_summary: JavaGuide is a comprehensive Java interview and backend interview guide covering computer fundamentals, databases, distributed systems, high concurrency, and AI application development.
